description: Compute whether the workflow designer has enough width for floating palette, center content, and properties panel using current panel widths.
Render the designer in vertically stacked normal flow when floating layout would leave the center content too narrow.
Remove floating-layout center padding in stacked mode so the main content can use the available width.
Make the properties panel full-width and disable its resize handle in stacked mode.
Keep existing floating behavior unchanged on wide screens.
